buildings.name: Cabin
buildings.desc: Sleeping quarters for 3 settlers. Warm at night.

buildings.name: Meeting Hall
buildings.desc: Recreation and society. Settlers gather here off-shift.

buildings.name: Hearth
buildings.desc: An open stone fire. Warms everyone within a few tiles — winter's answer.

buildings.name: Clothes Maker
buildings.desc: Weaves flax and straw into warm clothing (2 grain per set).

buildings.name: Burial Ground
buildings.desc: A fenced plot with simple rites. The dead rest here — and the living rest easier.

buildings.name: Bakery
buildings.desc: Big ovens, bigger batches. Cooks faster than the cookhouse — preferred when built.

buildings.name: Hunting Lodge
buildings.desc: One hunter per lodge ranges out for game — meals without grain.

buildings.name: Market
buildings.desc: Passing traders barter at fixed rates. Select it to swap wood, stone and grain.

buildings.name: Forester
buildings.desc: Plants saplings on nearby grass; they mature into harvestable trees.

buildings.name: Granary
buildings.desc: Cool dry storage: each granary lets 150 more meals keep without spoiling.

buildings.name: Clinic
buildings.desc: Two cots and clean bandages. The badly hurt heal twice as fast resting here.
